  "findings": [
    "Mechanical excavation equipment is being operated within the designated utility tolerance zone."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all mechanical excavation within the tolerance zone.",
    "Enforce hand-digging, potholing, or vacuum excavation methods to expose the utility safely before proceeding."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to CGA Best Practices (Chapter 5, Excavation), mechanical excavation is strictly prohibited within the specified tolerance zone of marked utilities. Hand digging, vacuum excavation, or other non-destructive methods must be used to expose the utility line safely before any power-driven equipment can be operated in that zone.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Section 5-14: Damage Prevention During Excavation",
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Section 5-19: Excavation Within Tolerance Zone"
  ]
}
